name: Password Cracking Tools - Hashcat or John the Ripper Execution
description: Detects execution of password cracking tools (Hashcat, John the Ripper) on endpoints. Identifies both tool execution and specific hash mode flags for credential cracking.
query: process where event.type == "start" and (process.name : ("hashcat.exe", "hashcat64.exe", "john.exe", "hashcat", "john") or process.args : ("-m 1000", "-m 5600", "-m 13100", "-m 18200", "--format=NT", "--format=netntlmv2"))
